title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.340 - Coroner to administer oath to witnesses
text:
58.340.  Coroner to administer oath to witnesses. — He or she shall administer to them an oath or affirmation in form as follows:
(RSMo 1939 § 13239, A.L. 2002 H.B. 2002 merged with S.B. 1113) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11620; 1919 § 5928; 1909 § 2933
